{{Quicksilver info}}
|strategy = 
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
* The item's name and [[named item effect]] is derived from the chemical element [http://chemistry.wikia.com/wiki/Mercury mercury], which is also known as quicksilver.
|quotes = 
|media = 
<gallery captionalign="center" orientation="square" spacing="small">
Quicksilver Sash screenshot.png|Active VFX
</gallery>
|sfx = 
;Activation
* {{sm2|Quicksilver Sash active SFX.ogg}} Active SFX
|revisions = 
|patchhistory =
;[[V14.15]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|900}} from {{g|850}}.
** Total cost unchanged.

;[[V14.8]]
* No longer cleanses {{cai|Realm of Death|Mordekaiser}}.

;[[V14.1]]
* No longer builds into {{ii|Silvermere Dawn}}.

;[[V10.23]]
* Updated icon.
* Now builds into {{ii|Silvermere Dawn}}.
* Active no longer removes {{tip|airborne}} effects.
* Limited to 1 {{sbc|Quicksilver}} item.

;[[V6.9]]
* {{sbc|Unique Active - Quicksilver}} now only cleanses [[Crowd control]] debuffs.

;[[V5.22]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|850}} from {{g|750}}.
** Total cost increased to {{g|1300}} from {{g|1250}}.

;[[V4.20]]
* Replaced {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} in recipe with {{ii|Null-Magic Mantle}}.
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|750}} from {{g|830}}.
* Item cost reduced to {{g|1250}} from {{g|1550}}.
* Magic resistance reduced to 30 from 45

;[[V3.02]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|830}} from {{g|850}}.
* Item cost reduced to {{g|1550}} from {{g|1660}}.

;[[V1.0.0.152]]
* Item cost increased to {{g|1660}} from {{g|1640}}.
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|850}} from {{g|900}}.
* Used in new item recipe: {{ii|Mercurial Scimitar}}.

;[[V1.0.0.142]]
* Combine gold cost increased to {{g|900}} from {{g|700}}.
* Magic resist reduced to 48 from 56.

;[[V1.0.0.126]]
* Adjusted {{iis|Quicksilver Sash}} cooldown to properly reflect the tooltip.

;[[V1.0.0.123]]
* Effect is now Unique.

;[[V1.0.0.120]]
* Cooldown reduced to 90 from 105 seconds.

;[[V1.0.0.111]]
* Magic resistance increased to 56 from 48.

;[[V1.0.0.103]]
* Cooldown reduced to 105 seconds from 120 seconds.
* Fixed a bug that allowed it to be affected by cooldown reduction.

;[[V1.0.0.82]]
* Cooldown reduced to 120 seconds from 150 seconds.
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|700}} from {{g|900}}.

;[[V1.0.0.61]] - Added
* {{ii|Quicksilver Sash}}
** Recipe: {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} {{g|900}}.
** +50 Magic resistance.
** Active Ability: Clears all negative debuffs from the owner. 150 second cooldown.
}}
